character_design.why: Character designs must match the game fantasy, visual tone, and world logic.

illustration.why: Illustration output must fit the visual direction and asset pipeline.

storyline.why: Story output defines or depends on setting, tone, conflict, and character voice.

physics_engine.why: Physics behavior must match player-facing rules and implementation interfaces.

npc_system.why: NPCs connect world logic, gameplay behavior, and code interfaces.

ui_hud.why: UI must present gameplay state, proficiency, and visual tone consistently.

level_design.why: Level design owns spatial pacing, activity placement, and skill-gated locations.

progression_system.why: Progression owns central proficiency rules, XP curves, unlocks, UI contract, and save shape.

daily_activities/*.why: Activities propose loops, risks, rewards, XP events, and unlock candidates.
